name: Single 2x2 obstacle in center
description: A 20x20 tile area with a 2x2 furnace-like obstacle centered at (2,0). Tests pathfinding around obstacles.

test_cases.name: path_around_obstacle
test_cases.description: Path from (0,0) to (5,0) must go around the obstacle at (1-2, -1 to 1)

test_cases.name: start_blocked
test_cases.description: Start position is inside the obstacle

test_cases.name: goal_blocked
test_cases.description: Goal position is inside the obstacle
